certificate.module_name: SUSE Linux Enterprise Libica Cryptographic Module
certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in approved mode with module SUSE Linux Enterprise OpenSSL Cryptographic Module validated to FIPS 140-3 under Cert. #4725 operating in approved mode. When installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11 of the Security Policy
certificate.description: The SUSE Linux Enterprise Server Libica Cryptographic Module is a software-hybrid module that provides general purpose cryptographic algorithms to applications running in the user space of the underlying operating system through a C language application program interface (API). The module is composed by a software library, which provides the API and a subset of the cryptographic algorithms, and the Central Processor Assist for Cryptographic Functions (CPACF), which is part of the z15 processor and provides cryptographic algorithms implemented in firmware and hardware.
